---
applyTo: "**/*.md"
---
# NomadTTY — Documentation Instructions
<!-- adapter; canonical source: docs/ai/engineering-rules.md -->
<!-- last updated: 2026-06-20 -->

- Update `docs/ai/**` FIRST, then synchronise adapter files.
- Every decision → `docs/ai/decision-log.md` immediately with timestamp.
- Every mistake → `docs/ai/mistakes.md` immediately (newest first).
- Every notable change → `docs/ai/change-trace.md` before commit.
- Comments in code: only when WHY is non-obvious. Add timestamp for workarounds.
- Do not comment WHAT code does — names do that.
- Keep README.md in sync with the current toolbar layout and architecture.
